channel.name: Sonat Mundi
channel.description:
Sonat Mundi — United Colours of Sound — Omnia Resonant
Where ancient wisdom meets modern frequencies. A timeless sonic universe that speaks to every sense, every emotion, every corner of the world.
Close your eyes. Feel the vibration. Let the sound transform you.
🌍 SOUNDS OF WORLD
195 nations · Turkey · Japan · Persia · India · Bali · Arabia · Africa · Celtic · Nordic · Tibet · Andes · Silk Road & more...
🎭 SOUNDS OF EMOTIONS
Joy · Melancholy · Serenity · Passion · Wonder · Nostalgia · Euphoria · Stillness & more...
🎯 SOUNDS OF CONCEPTS
Study · Sleep · Meditation · Yoga · Healing · Driving · Dining & more...
✨ SOUNDS OF FREQUENCIES
432 Hz · 528 Hz · 639 Hz · 963 Hz · Solfeggio · Binaural
🌐 sonatmundi.com
© Sonat Mundi — United Colours of Sound Omnia Resonant — All things resonate.
#SonatMundi #OmniaResonant #UnitedColoursofSound #SoundsOfWorld #SoundsOfEmotions #AmbientMusic #MeditationMusic #StudyMusic #SleepMusic #SufiMusic #PersianLounge #Solfeggio #LofiMusic #NatureSound
